{{Infobox event
| name = Trial of Glorious Ascension
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Trial of Glorious Ascension Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Trial]] of Glorious Ascension serves as the initial examination for prospective disciples at the [[Heaven's Glory]] School. This test consists of a steep mountain staircase shrouded in a pink-tinted cloud and is protected by various [[scripts]] that prevent anyone who begins the climb from retreating. The trial utilizes tamed mind-aspect and spirit-aspect [[Remnants]] that manifest as claws or tails to challenge a climber's mental fortitude, determination, and spiritual stability. As an individual ascends, the difficulty of the trial increases. Success is measured by reaching the summit. While completing the climb grants disciple status, finishing before sunset provides a significant reward: the ability to select a single item from the school's [[Lesser Treasure Hall]], which contains various weapons, elixirs, constructs, and training supplements. The trial is extremely dangerous; approximately one-third of participants either perish or suffer permanent spiritual damage that prevents them from practicing [[sacred arts]], and only one-fifth of survivors manage to meet the sunset deadline.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Trial]] of Glorious Ascension is a rigorous test featuring a staircase filled with clouds of light containing spirit-aspect and mind-aspect [[Remnant]] formations. This trial is designed to evaluate a disciple's spirit foundations, determination, and resolve, though it carries extreme risks as one in three challengers either dies or suffers a broken spirit that prevents them from practicing [[sacred arts]]. While the trial can be completed before sunset, only one in five surviving disciples earns the right to select from the [[Lesser Treasure Hall]]. Following its occurrence, [[Whitehall]] expressed his belief that [[Lindon]] had cheated in order to pass the trial.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Trial of Glorious Ascension]] is a test consisting of a staircase with [[Remnant]] formations within clouds of light.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c12">''Unsouled'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Trial of Glorious Ascension]] uses spirit-aspect and mind-aspect [[Remnants]] to test a disciple's resolve, determination, and spirit foundations.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|One in three disciples who challenges the [[Trial of Glorious Ascension]] either dies or has their spirit broken, rendering them unable to practice [[sacred arts]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Trial of Glorious Ascension]] is a test where only one in five surviving disciples can select from the [[Lesser Treasure Hall]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c13">''Unsouled'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Trial of Glorious Ascension]] can be completed before sunset.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c14">''Unsouled'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Whitehall]] believed [[Lindon]] cheated to pass the [[Trial of Glorious Ascension]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19">''Unsouled'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Heaven’s Glory School]] calls the process of climbing certain stairs the [[Trial of Glorious Ascension]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7">''Bloodline'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Students who complete the [[Trial of Glorious Ascension]] within a time limit are rewarded.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
